text: I find myself immersed in a space dedicated to research and development. The glass walls and modern design evoke a sense of transparency and openness—a fitting metaphor for innovation. Blue and orange light reflect off the walls, suggesting creative energy and progress. There is a serenity here, yet also a sense of anticipation; ideas are being formed, tested, and displayed. I feel curious and somewhat inspired, my mind awake to the possibilities and stories that these walls and screens might hold.
